purpose: Check whether generated preview SKILL.md fixtures are visible to real Codex and Claude Code runtime prompt surfaces before installable adapter manifests exist.

staging.method: temporary CODEX_HOME with preview skills copied under skills/

model_route.network_note: The first Codex exec attempt failed under sandboxed DNS; rerun with approved network escalation completed after transient reconnects.

tasks.task: safe project maintenance with memory, docs validation, and commit closeout
tasks.interpretation: core-ops was prompt-visible, but the model chose mature leaf/utility skills when the shared full skill root was also available.

tasks.task: distill public agent workflow sources into reusable workflow contracts and future skill proposals

staging.method: session-only --plugin-dir with preview skills under plugin skills/

plugin_validation.warning: author metadata omitted in temporary plugin manifest

observed_debug_signals: Loaded inline plugin from path: ml-research-act059-preview
Loaded 3 skills from plugin ml-research-act059-preview default directory

model_route.blocker: Local Claude Code CLI returned `Not logged in` before model inference, after the plugin and skill prompt were built.

conclusions: Generated preview skill directories are structurally accepted by Codex and Claude Code prompt surfaces without modifying global installs.
Codex selected the paper-reading and research-distillation preview skills for matching profile-level tasks.

Codex did not select core-ops for a general maintenance prompt when mature leaf skills were also visible; installable core-ops adapters need either profile-first isolation or a stronger entrypoint/routing contract.
Claude Code prompt visibility is confirmed through plugin debug logs, but auth-enabled model-choice capture remains a separate follow-up.
next_actions: Do not create installable adapter manifests until core-ops selection semantics are resolved.
If Claude model-choice evidence is needed, rerun the same session-only plugin capture in an authenticated Claude Code environment.
